trending_videos.title: State of Play | June 2, 2026 [English]
trending_videos.description:
State of Play returns Tuesday, June 2 with more than 60 minutes of updates, announcements, and gameplay reveals from top studios around the world. 

To kick things off, you’ll get a closer look at Marvel’s Wolverine. Insomniac Games will share more from its upcoming third-person action-adventure game showing off Logan’s brutal and relentless combat along with some new details. This all-new take on the comic book legend launches on PS5 September 15.

Watch the State of Play broadcast live Tuesday, June 2 at 2:00pm PT / 5:00pm ET / 11:00pm CEST | June 3 at 6:00am JST on YouTube and Twitch. The broadcast will be in English, with Japanese subtitles also available. We hope to see you then!

Regarding co-streaming and video-on-demand (VOD)

Please note that this broadcast may include copyrighted content (e.g. licensed music) that Sony Interactive Entertainment does not control. We welcome and celebrate our amazing co-streamers and creators, but licensing agreements outside our control could

trending_videos.title: Silo — Season 3 Official Trailer | Apple TV
trending_videos.description:
The end of the world had a beginning. Silo returns July 3 only on Apple TV.  https://apple.co/_Silo

Season three of “Silo” continues the saga of a dystopian society of 10,000 people living underground under mysterious circumstances, while revealing an origin story set centuries earlier. In the present, Juliette Nichols (Ferguson) survives her forced “cleaning” but returns with memory loss as the silo recovers from rebellion and faces a dangerous new threat. Meanwhile, in the “Before Times,” journalist Helen Drew (Jessica Henwick) and Congressman Daniel Keene (Ashley Zukerman) uncover a conspiracy that pulls them into a chain of events with catastrophic, irreversible consequences. The series is based on Hugh Howey’s New York Times bestselling trilogy, “Silo.”

The ensemble cast returning alongside Ferguson includes Common, Harriet Walter, Chinaza Uche, Avi Nash, Alexandria Riley, Shane McRae, Remmie Milner, Rick Gomez, Billy Postlethwaite and Clare Perkins. Joining the cast for season

trending_videos.title: Star Fox — Overview Trailer — Nintendo Switch 2
trending_videos.description:
Star Fox launches exclusively on the Nintendo Switch 2 system June 25, 2026. Pre-orders are available now on Nintendo eShop: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/star-fox-switch-2/

Step into the boots of Fox McCloud and blast off for adventure to save the Lylat System from the evil scientist, Andross. Take to the skies in the Arwing, protect the ground in the Landmaster, and plumb the depths in the Blue-Marine. Learn more about this cinematic take on the Star Fox 64 story, reborn exclusively on Nintendo Switch 2!

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

Subscribe for more Nintendo fun: https://goo.gl/HYYsot

Follow Nintendo of America
X/Twitter: https://twitter.com/NintendoAmerica
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/NintendoAmerica
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nintendoamerica
Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/nintendo

trailer_videos.insight: Trailer videos make up 50% of the trending list, indicating a strong viewer interest in upcoming releases across different entertainment sectors including movies, TV series, and video games.

titles: Star Fox — Overview Trailer — Nintendo Switch 2
gaming_content.insight: Gaming-related content represents 30% of the trending videos, highlighting a consistent demand for gaming updates and new releases. This suggests a robust market opportunity for creators and brands within the gaming sector.

titles: Honest Trailers | The Boys: The Final Season
Reliving Childhood Trauma on Goofy Gorillas
nostalgia_and_pop_culture.insight: Content that plays on nostalgia or pop culture, such as 'Honest Trailers' and videos exploring past themes ('Reliving Childhood Trauma'), continues to engage audiences, presenting an opportunity for creators to capitalize on nostalgia-driven content.

top_channels.insight: A24, known for its unique film offerings, continues to capture audience interest with trailers, suggesting potential for future collaborations or content releases in similar genres.
PlayStation's 'State of Play' events maintain high viewer engagement, underscoring the importance of regularly updating audiences on gaming developments.
Bollywood content, represented by Maddock Films, shows international appeal, indicating a growing interest in Indian cinema and opportunities for cross-cultural content collaborations.

diverse_content_sources.insight: The trending list features a diverse mix of content sources and types (films, TV series, gaming, and comedic commentary), suggesting that YouTube's audience values a variety of content formats and genres, which creators can leverage by diversifying their content strategies.

global_cinematic_interest.insight: With trailers across multiple entertainment forms trending, there is a clear market opportunity for global cinematic content. Creators can focus on releasing high-quality, engaging trailers to capture and sustain interest.

gaming_updates_and_releases.insight: Given the prominence of gaming content, there is an opportunity for creators to expand into gaming news, reviews, and walkthroughs to cater to the growing audience base seeking gaming-related content.

nostalgia-driven_content.insight: The appeal of nostalgia and pop culture presents a market opportunity for content that revisits or reimagines past themes and shows, appealing to audiences seeking both entertainment and a sense of nostalgia.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
